title: Vaccine Administration Resources | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
5 
Purpose 
Access web-based trainings, videos, checklists, job-aids, and other resources for health care personnel who administer vaccines. Remember to always follow the most up-to-date guidelines in the Vaccine Storage and Handling Toolkit or recently dated materials.
Immunization Schedules 
Get the current immunization schedules that have been approved by The Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) and adopted by the CDC Director. 
Provider Schedules 
Child and Adolescent Immunization Schedule by Age (Addendum updated August 7, 2025) 
Guide health care providers in determining recommended vaccines for each age group. 
Adult Immunization Schedule by Age (Addendum updated August 7, 2025) 
Stay up-to-date on recommended vaccines. View and print CDC immunization schedules for adults. 
Patient Friendly Schedules 
Your child needs vaccines as they grow! 
Guide for parents and caregivers to ensure their child is up-to-date on recommended childhood vaccin 
Older children and teens need vaccines too! 
Guide for parents to ensure their teen is up-to-date on recommended childhood vaccines 
Recommended Vaccinations for Adults 
Guide for individuals to ensure they stay up-to-date on recommended vaccines. 
Shared Clinical Decision-Making
